remarks: Commanding panoramic views of Long Island Sound, this extraordinary coastal retreat offers a front-row seat to the dramatic interplay of sea, sky & light. Thoughtfully designed by Louise Brooks of Brooks & Falotico, the residence blends timeless elegance w/ exceptional craftsmanship and over 9,000 sqft of refined living space across 4 elevator-serviced levels. Designed for both relaxed living & sophisticated entertaining, the home features a stunning chef's kitchen w/ professional-grade appliances, fireplace & imported French heated stone floors. Sun-filled living & dining rooms offer French doors that lead to a private terrace overlooking Tavern Island, Rowayton Harbor, & the sparkling Sound. 5 beautifully appointed en-suite bedrooms provide comfort & privacy, including a luxurious primary suite w/ a recently renovated spa bath, steam shower, soaking tub, custom vanities & walk-in closets. A spacious private office with built-ins offers a serene work-from-home setting, and guests can enjoy a charming 3rd fl. bedroom w/bath. A spectacular top-floor entertainment space w/ kitchenette opens to a deck with sweeping waterviews for gatherings & sunsets. The lower level is dedicated to wellness & recreation, featuring a gym, sauna, wineroom, & abundant storage. Nestled within Harbor Bluff, an exclusive enclave of just 12 custom homes, residents enjoy a lock-and-leave lifestyle w/ the privacy of a Single-family residence. Coastal Connecticut living at its finest.
